channel.title: GitHub Dart Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of Dart in GitHub

item.title: KRTirtho/spotube
item.description: 🎧 Open source Spotify client that doesn't require Premium nor uses Electron! Available for both desktop & mobile!

item.title: ImranR98/Obtainium
item.description: Get Android app updates straight from the source.

item.title: flutter/flutter
item.description: Flutter makes it easy and fast to build beautiful apps for mobile and beyond

item.title: flame-engine/flame
item.description: A Flutter based game engine.

item.title: chen08209/FlClash
item.description: A multi-platform proxy client based on ClashMeta,simple and easy to use, open-source and ad-free.

item.title: imaNNeo/fl_chart
item.description: FL Chart is a highly customizable Flutter chart library that supports Line Chart, Bar Chart, Pie Chart, Scatter Chart, and Radar Chart.

item.title: hiddify/hiddify-app
item.description: Multi-platform auto-proxy client, supporting Sing-box, X-ray, TUIC, Hysteria, Reality, Trojan, SSH etc. It’s an open-source, secure and ad-free.

item.title: Predidit/Kazumi
item.description: 基于自定义规则的番剧采集APP，支持流媒体在线观看，支持弹幕。

item.title: abuanwar072/E-commerce-Complete-Flutter-UI
item.description: The FlutterShop template makes it easier to develop an e-commerce app using Flutter. It includes all the necessary pages to build a shopping app for both Android and iOS using flutter.

item.title: guozhigq/pilipala
item.description: PiliPala 是使用Flutter开发的BiliBili第三方客户端，感谢使用。

item.title: gokadzev/Musify
item.description: Unlock the full potential of music: Stream effortlessly with one app!

item.title: academind/flutter-complete-guide-course-resources
item.description: Course resources (code snapshots & slides) for our complete Flutter & Dart course (https://acad.link/flutter).

item.title: MaikuB/flutter_local_notifications
item.description: A Flutter plugin for displaying local notifications on Android, iOS, macOS and Linux

item.title: pichillilorenzo/flutter_inappwebview
item.description: A Flutter plugin that allows you to add an inline webview, to use a headless webview, and to open an in-app browser window.

item.title: ente-io/ente
item.description: Fully open source, End to End Encrypted alternative to Google Photos and Apple Photos

item.title: miguelpruivo/flutter_file_picker
item.description: File picker plugin for Flutter, compatible with mobile (iOS & Android), Web, Desktop (Mac, Linux, Windows) platforms with Flutter Go support.

item.title: Solido/awesome-flutter
item.description: An awesome list that curates the best Flutter libraries, tools, tutorials, articles and more.

item.title: wanghongenpin/proxypin
item.description: Open source free capture HTTP(S) traffic software ProxyPin, supporting full platform systems

item.title: dart-lang/sdk
item.description: The Dart SDK, including the VM, JS and Wasm compilers, analysis, core libraries, and more.

item.title: krille-chan/fluffychat
item.description: The cutest instant messenger in the [matrix]

item.title: iampawan/FlutterExampleApps
item.description: [Example APPS] Basic Flutter apps, for flutter devs.
